title: rubus ligulatifolius
intro: Rubus ligulatifolius, also known as the ligulate-leaved raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rubiaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus ligulatifolius include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant activity. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it may be used as a tincture or added to skincare products due to its potential anti-aging properties.
